text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Groove, about the tea you shared with<n>me
yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What is it? Did it not suit your tastes?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, quite the opposite! I was wondering<n>if you
could tell me the brand so I can<n>buy some more.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you enjoyed it, but<n>unfortunately it is not
something you can<n>purchase. That tea was made
with<n>chamomile flowers I grew myself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yourself?! Oh my, I received quite the<n>valuable
gift.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then may I ask for some more to<n>send to
my family? They love all kinds of<n>tea!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
N-now wait just a moment! I'm afraid I<n>can't allow
you to do that!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your family's thank-you gifts always<n>completely
fill up my room. I end up<n>with no place to sleep!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Yes, I can see that. They do tend to<n>go a bit
overboard expressing their<n>gratitude.
